justification:
The paper applies a standard full-trajectory damped-sinusoid fit (NLLS/MLE under Gaussian noise) and demonstrates qualitatively good reconstructions, but several audits flag important gaps. Numerical checks reveal contradictions between stated thresholds and Table 1, the SNR metric is defined post-fit and risks circularity, and key assumptions (MLE equivalence) and notation (residuals) are under-specified, limiting rigor and reproducibility.
Novelty and positioning are weak for a well-known approach, and the evidence base is thin (N=20, no baselines, no uncertainty quantification or robustness tests). Writing is generally clear, but parameterization/units inconsistencies and missing methodological details further reduce confidence in the broader robustness and efficiency claims.
